meta.title: Home
meta.description: AI generalist building agentic workflows, internal automation, and reliable systems from concept to shipped use.

hero.title: I build AI systems that do real work, not just generate output.
hero.subtitle: AI Generalist / Agentic Automation Builder focused on workflows across ops, marketing, sales, and research.
hero.supportingLine: I prototype fast, integrate APIs and models, and ship operational tooling with traceability, gated execution, and deterministic run options.

selectedWork.heading: Selected Projects
selectedWork.intro: Flagship work includes Dev Toolbox 2.0 and Toolbox GPT: systems for planning, execution, and audit-ready AI-assisted delivery.

productApproach.heading: How I Build
productApproach.intro: My workflow stays practical: define contracts, run experiments, inspect traces, and iterate until behavior is stable.

pillars.title: Systems before prompts
pillars.body: I treat prompts as inputs to a workflow, not a product strategy. The system includes contracts, logs, guardrails, and clear ownership.

pillars.title: Preview -> apply for side effects
pillars.body: For side-effectful operations, I use contract-driven planning with explicit preview and apply phases so changes stay reviewable and safe.

pillars.title: Traceability by default
pillars.body: Runs emit structured traces and audit logs so decisions, outputs, and tool actions can be inspected and replayed.

pillars.title: Probe-fix-probe iteration
pillars.body: I use probe loops to verify assumptions, apply small fixes, and retest until outputs are reliable under real conditions.

skillsGrid.heading: Skills & Capabilities
skillsGrid.intro: Builder/operator mix: agentic workflow design, practical integrations, and shipping internal systems teams can trust.

categories.title: AI Workflow & Agentic Systems

categories.title: Product Delivery & Engineering

auroraPreview.heading: Aurora: Conceptual Direction
auroraPreview.body: Aurora is my long-term exploration of conversational software development. It informs how I think about intent capture, explainability, and contract-driven agent behavior.

aboutPreview.heading: My Background
aboutPreview.body: I moved from operations leadership into software by solving the same problem in both worlds: reduce friction, clarify handoffs, and build systems that stay reliable as conditions change.

writingPreview.heading: Writing on Building Reliable AI Workflows
items: Probe-Fix-Probe as a Practical Build Loop
Why Traceability Matters in AI-Assisted Delivery

contactCta.body: If you are hiring for AI workflow, automation, or internal tooling work, I am open to roles where practical delivery and reliable systems matter.
